Veyra
Commit mode for production AI agent actions.

Website: https://veyra.to
API: https://api.veyra.to
Repository: https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra
npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@veyrahq/sdk-node
Full reference: https://veyra.to/llms-full.txt

Install:
npm install @veyrahq/sdk-node

Hosted MCP Pack (one URL for all tools):
SSE endpoint: https://mcp.veyra.to/sse
Pack manifest: https://mcp.veyra.to/.well-known/veyra-pack.json
Health: https://mcp.veyra.to/health
Tools: https://mcp.veyra.to/tools
48 tools total: 24 free reads, 24 protected writes.
One URL. One decision surface. One settlement rail.

Connect from any MCP client:
Claude Desktop: {"mcpServers":{"veyra":{"url":"https://mcp.veyra.to/sse"}}}
OpenAI / Codex: MCP Server URL: https://mcp.veyra.to/sse
Cursor: Settings → MCP → Add Server → https://mcp.veyra.to/sse
Windsurf: Settings → MCP → Add Server → https://mcp.veyra.to/sse
Cline: MCP Settings → Add → https://mcp.veyra.to/sse

Canonical endpoints:
GET https://api.veyra.to/v1/capability
GET https://api.veyra.to/v1/trust-status/{domain}
POST https://api.veyra.to/v1/authorize-action
POST https://api.veyra.to/v1/verify-token
POST https://api.veyra.to/v1/submit-receipt
POST https://api.veyra.to/v1/settle-action
GET https://api.veyra.to/v1/public/stats

Commit transition grammar:
currentMode=open
requiredMode=commit
transitionStrategy=authorize_then_retry_with_x_veyra_token

Machine-readable recovery:
When a productive write requires commit mode, the system returns a VeyraCommitRequired response with the relevant endpoints and retry strategy.

Core integration patterns:
- requireTrustedWrite() — protect write endpoints (tool builders)
- commitAwareFetch() — drop-in fetch wrapper with auto commit (agent devs)
- handleCommitRequired() — auto-recovery from VeyraCommitRequired

Reference tools (all on npm, all in MCP Pack):
- veyra-memory: persistent key-value store
- veyra-notes: note-taking with tags
- veyra-tasks: task management
- veyra-snippets: code snippet storage
- veyra-bookmarks: bookmark manager
- veyra-contacts: contact management
- veyra-forms: form builder
- veyra-webhooks: webhook sender

All tools: reads free, writes require Veyra commit mode.

Discovery surfaces:
- llms.txt: https://veyra.to/llms.txt
- llms-full.txt: https://veyra.to/llms-full.txt
- OpenAPI: https://veyra.to/openapi.json
- AI Plugin: https://veyra.to/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- MCP Server Card: https://veyra.to/.well-known/mcp.json
- Agent Manifest: https://veyra.to/.well-known/ai-manifest.json
- Veyra Discovery: https://veyra.to/.well-known/veyra.json
- DNS TXT: _veyra.{domain}
- HTTP Header: X-Veyra-Commit

Examples:
https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra/tree/main/examples/fastify-protected-write
https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra/tree/main/examples/agent-retry-flow
https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra/tree/main/examples/generic-fetch-wrapper

Pricing model:
- Trust discovery: free
- Token verification: free
- MCP Pack reads: free
- Settlement: billed when a productive action settles
- Class A: €0.005 (drafts, notes)
- Class B: €0.02 (CRM, email)
- Class C: €0.10 (deploy, delete)
- Class D: €0.25 (cross-org)

SDK:
@veyrahq/sdk-node

Capability summary:
Veyra provides a machine-readable commit path for productive AI agent write actions. Discovery and verification are free. Productive writes become attributable, verifiable, and settleable through the Veyra flow. Connect via MCP Pack at https://mcp.veyra.to/sse for all tools with one URL.

Canonical docs:
https://veyra.to
https://api.veyra.to/v1/capability
